title: Daily starter kit
description: it adds starter kit which has iron armour and tools and 32 cooked steaks if want to claim again wait 24 hours still only these features
body:
# Daily Starter Kit Plugin

Boost player engagement with daily rewards and customizable starter kits!

The Daily Starter Kit plugin is the perfect solution for Minecraft server owners looking to reward players with daily goodies and provide new players with a customizable starting experience. Whether you're running a survival, factions, or creative server, this plugin adds excitement and motivation for players to return daily and kickstart their journey with essential items, tools, or bonuses.

# ✨ Key Features
# 



**Starter Kits:** kits with special items for starting to the server.



**Cooldown Management:** Set daily reward timers to keep things fair and encourage consistent player 



**Lightweight & Optimized:** Designed to run smoothly on any server, from small communities to large networks.

# 🚀 Why Choose Daily Starter Kit?





**Engage Your Players:** Keep your community active with exciting daily rewards that make every login rewarding.



**Perfect for Any Server:** Whether it's survival, SkyBlock, or minigames, the plugin adapts to your server's needs.



**Hassle-Free Setup:** Get started in minutes with intuitive commands and documentation.

# 📋 Available Commands


•  /dailykit - Claim your daily starter kit Aliases (shortcuts)

•  /dsk - Same as /dailykit •  /kit - Same as /dailykit Permissions

• dailystarterkits.claim - Required to use the /dailykit command (default: true for all players)

# 📚 How to Use





Install the plugin on your server.



Configure your daily rewards and starter kits in the config.yml file.



Set up permissions for different player groups.



Watch your players enjoy their daily rewards and starter kits!

# 💡 Compatibility





Supports Minecraft versions [e.g., 1.16–1.21] (update with your plugin’s supported versions).



Works with popular permission plugins like LuckPerms and PermissionsEx.



Compatible with economy plugins like Vault for currency rewards.

# 📢 Get Support

Need help? Join our Discord server or check out the documentation for setup guides and FAQs.

Give your players a reason to log in every day with the Daily Starter Kit plugin! Download now and elevate your server experience.
